name: Charleston Tea Plantation Wedding Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brewed, chilled tea, apple juice, and chilled pineapple juice in a large punch bowl.
2. Stir until well mixed.
3. Refrigerate the mixture until ready to serve.
4. Just before serving, add the club soda, orange slices, lemon slices, and fresh mint leaves to the punch.
5. Serve over ice.
6. This recipe makes about 35 servings of 4-ounce portions.
